description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a sprawling, L-shaped floor plan and a mix of indoor and outdoor living spaces. The structure features a combination of dark and light exterior walls, large windows, and multiple sliding glass doors that open onto wooden decks and patios. A prominent covered carport is attached to one side, while the opposite side is lined with palm trees and a spacious veranda. The roof is mostly flat with a slightly raised, dark section over the carport, and the outdoor areas are seamlessly integrated with the interior through wide openings. The interior layout includes several bedrooms, bathrooms, a kitchen, living areas, and utility spaces, all arranged for easy access and flow. The overall design emphasizes openness, natural light, and a strong connection to the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story L-shaped bungalow with large windows, wooden decks, a covered carport, and a spacious veranda surrounded by palm trees.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entrance, central living area, and the open wooden deck flanked by large windows and sliding doors.
description_view_1: This angle showcases the carport, the rear bedrooms, and the extensive veranda with palm trees, emphasizing the outdoor-indoor connection.
description_view_2: The carport and driveway are prominent here, along with the rear deck and the arrangement of rooms facing the backyard.
description_view_3: This side reveals the back of the bungalow, utility areas, and the full length of the veranda with grouped windows and doors.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
